## Description

Please include a detailed summary of the changes introduced by this Pull Request. List any dependencies or configuration adjustments required, and reference the corresponding issue if applicable.

- **Issue/Ticket Link**: #
- **Components Modified**:

---

## Type of Change

Please tick the options that are relevant to this PR:

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation Update
- [ ] 🛠️ Tooling, Scripts, or CI/CD Configuration

---

## Validation Checklist

Please verify that the following checks are met before requesting review:

- [ ] **Type safety**: `npm run typecheck` completes successfully with zero compilation or definition errors.
- [ ] **Code quality**: `npm run lint` completes successfully with zero warnings or errors.
- [ ] **Formating standard**: `npm run format:check` compiles successfully with no formatting violations.
- [ ] **Compilation stability**: `npm run build` succeeds cleanly.
- [ ] **Design Review**: Visual components comply with our curated responsive layout standards and premium aesthetics.
